title: Vacation Preparation
instruction: Prepare for your vacation. First, go to Settings and: enable the vacation responder with the message 'I am out of office until March 21. For urgent matters, contact my backup.', update your signature to include 'OOO until March 21', and change undo send to 30 seconds. Then create a filter that forwards emails from theo.nguyen@executive.test to maya.garcia@ops-backup.test and stars them. Go back to your inbox and reply to three pending emails: reply to Sofia Brooks about the vendor proposal, reply to Jordan Patel about the timeline (Reply only — the thread includes others), and reply to Nina Garcia confirming attendance. Star the two emails you need to follow up on when you return, and create a 'Return Attention' label for them.
eval_check_descriptions: Boss email filter created with forward and star
Return Attention label applied to return emails

resolved_targets.vacation_message: I am out of office until March 21. For urgent matters, contact my backup.

emails.subject: Confirm attendance for the leadership retreat
emails.body:
Please confirm whether you will attend the leadership retreat on March 25.

We need final headcounts by end of week.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.subject: Project timeline for the infrastructure rollout
emails.body:
Here is the updated timeline for the infrastructure rollout. Can you confirm you are aligned on the milestones?

I need to follow up when you're back on the resource allocation for phase 2.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: Updated rollout checklist
emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Maya

emails.subject: Vendor proposal for Q2 office supplies
emails.body:
Attached is the vendor proposal for Q2 office supplies. Could you review the pricing and confirm whether we should move forward?

Please follow up when you're back — I know you have a lot on your plate before vacation.

Thanks,
Sofia

emails.subject: Updated rollout checklist
emails.body:
Passing along the current draft so you have it in one place.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. No response needed unless you want anything reordered.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

Most of the edits were minor, with one budget line still waiting on approval. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.body:
I pulled the loose ends into one note for easier review.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Avery
